svg.title: Cook packet scale frontier: 2p x 16 tape bit x 16384 steps
svg.text: Cook packet scale frontier: 2 production x 16 tape bit x 16384 steps
Initial row encoded once; the 16384-step evolution is rendered with 5-level density buckets (50/55/60/65/75% thresholds) over a 280x280 viewport.
